title: [SLP] Fix extract-cost scale using NCD of all external-user sites
author: alexey-bataev
description:
ExtractCostCalculated deduplicates by scalar so only the first
ExternalUser determines the scale, making the cost depend on IR block
ordering via LLVM's reverse-insertion use-list order.
Add a pre-pass computing ScalarToExtractBlock - the nearest common
dominator of all effective extract sites per scalar. For PHI users inside
a loop the effective site is the incoming block; for PHI users outside
all loops it is the PHI's own block (scale = 1). The extract cost is
then scaled by getLoopNestScale of the NCD block, which is fully
order-independent.

Fixes #199548

tests.test_body:
declare void @sink_use(i32, i32, i32)

define double @test(ptr %obj, ptr %arr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  %pos1 = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %obj, i64 44
  %pos2 = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %obj, i64 48
  %cond.enter = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cond.enter, label %outer.preheader, label %exit

outer.preheader:                                  ; preds = %entry
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %outer.latch, %outer.preheader
  %"$vphi.1" = phi i32 [ 16, %outer.preheader ], [ %.sink6.i.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %"$vphi.0" = phi i32 [ 4, %outer.preheader ], [ %.sink.i.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %local_4_128 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.preheader ], [ %lcssa.iv, %outer.latch ]
  %local_3_127 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.preheader ], [ %local_3_16.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  br label %inner.header

inner.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.body, %outer.header
  %"$vphi.1418" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.1", %outer.header ], [ %.sink6.i, %inner.body ]
  %"$vphi.0419" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.0", %outer.header ], [ %.sink.i, %inner.body ]
  %local_4_128420 = phi i32 [ %local_4_128, %outer.header ], [ %inc, %inner.body ]
  %local_3_127421 = phi i32 [ %local_3_127, %outer.header ], [ %local_3_16, %inner.body ]
  %chunk.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %chunk.iv.next, %inner.body ]
  %c27 = icmp ult i32 %"$vphi.0419", 17
  %c28 = icmp ult i32 %"$vphi.1418", 17
  %wide.chk = and i1 %c28, %c27
  %.not3.i17 = icmp eq i32 %"$vphi.0419", 0
  %v29 = add i32 %"$vphi.0419", -1
  %.sink.i18 = select i1 %.not3.i17, i32 16, i32 %v29
  %c30 = icmp ult i32 %.sink.i18, 17
  %wide.chk354 = and i1 %wide.chk, %c30
  %.not4.i19 = icmp eq i32 %"$vphi.1418", 0
  %v31 = add i32 %"$vphi.1418", -1
  %.sink6.i20 = select i1 %.not4.i19, i32 16, i32 %v31
  %c32 = icmp ult i32 %.sink6.i20, 17
  %wide.chk355 = and i1 %c32, %wide.chk354
  br i1 %wide.chk355, label %inner.body, label %deopt

inner.body:                                       ; preds = %inner.header
  %chunk.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %chunk.iv, 1
  %v34 = zext nneg i32 %"$vphi.0419" to i64
  %v35 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v34
  %v36 = load i32, ptr %v35, align 4
  %v37 = zext nneg i32 %"$vphi.1418" to i64
  %v38 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v37
  %v39 = load i32, ptr %v38, align 4
  %v40 = sub i32 %v36, %v39
  %v41 = add nsw i32 %v40, 2147483647
  %v42 = icmp slt i32 %v40, 0
  %spec.select.i13 = select i1 %v42, i32 %v41, i32 %v40
  store i32 %spec.select.i13, ptr %v38, align 4
  %v43 = sitofp i32 %spec.select.i13 to double
  %v44 = fmul nnan double %v43, f0x3E00000000200000
  %v45 = zext nneg i32 %.sink.i18 to i64
  %v46 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v45
  %v47 = load i32, ptr %v46, align 4
  %v48 = zext nneg i32 %.sink6.i20 to i64
  %v49 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v48
  %v50 = load i32, ptr %v49, align 4
  %v51 = sub i32 %v47, %v50
  %v52 = add nsw i32 %v51, 2147483647
  %v53 = icmp slt i32 %v51, 0
  %spec.select.i = select i1 %v53, i32 %v52, i32 %v51
  store i32 %spec.select.i, ptr %v49, align 4
  %.not3.i = icmp eq i32 %.sink.i18, 0
  %v54 = add nsw i32 %.sink.i18, -1
  %.sink.i = select i1 %.not3.i, i32 16, i32 %v54
  store i32 %.sink.i, ptr %pos1, align 4
  %.not4.i = icmp eq i32 %.sink6.i20, 0
  %v55 = add nsw i32 %.sink6.i20, -1
  %.sink6.i = select i1 %.not4.i, i32 16, i32 %v55
  store i32 %.sink6.i, ptr %pos2, align 8
  %v56 = sitofp i32 %spec.select.i to double
  %v57 = fmul nnan double %v56, f0x3E00000000200000
  %v58 = fmul nnan double %v44, %v44
  %v59 = fmul nnan double %v57, %v57
  %v60 = fadd double %v58, %v59
  %v61 = fcmp ole double %v60, 1.000000e+00
  %v62 = zext i1 %v61 to i32
  %local_3_16 = add i32 %v62, %local_3_127421
  %inc = add nuw nsw i32 %local_4_128420, 1
  %.not = icmp slt i32 %inc, %n
  %chunk.cond = icmp samesign ult i64 %chunk.iv, 32
  %v64 = and i1 %.not, %chunk.cond
  br i1 %v64, label %inner.header, label %outer.latch

deopt:                                            ; preds = %inner.header
  %"$vphi.0419.lcssa" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.0419", %inner.header ]
  %local_4_128420.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_4_128420, %inner.header ]
  %local_3_127421.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_3_127421, %inner.header ]
  call void @sink_use(i32 %"$vphi.0419.lcssa", i32 %local_4_128420.lcssa, i32 %local_3_127421.lcssa)
  ret double 0.000000e+00

outer.latch:                                      ; preds = %inner.body
  %.sink.i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %.sink.i, %inner.body ]
  %.sink6.i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %.sink6.i, %inner.body ]
  %local_3_16.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_3_16, %inner.body ]
  %lcssa.iv = phi i32 [ %inc, %inner.body ]
  %.not.lcssa = phi i1 [ %.not, %inner.body ]
  br i1 %.not.lcssa, label %outer.header, label %exit.loop

exit.loop:                                        ; preds = %outer.latch
  %final = phi i32 [ %local_3_16.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %result = sitofp i32 %final to double
  br label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %exit.loop, %entry
  %ret.val = phi double [ 0.000000e+00, %entry ], [ %result, %exit.loop ]
  %nfp = sitofp i32 %n to double
  %div = fdiv double %ret.val, %nfp
  %mul = fmul double %div, 4.000000e+00
  ret double %mul
}

declare void @sink_use(i32, i32, i32)

define double @test_inloop_first(ptr %obj, ptr %arr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  %pos1 = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %obj, i64 44
  %pos2 = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %obj, i64 48
  %cond.enter = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cond.enter, label %outer.preheader, label %exit

outer.preheader:                                  ; preds = %entry
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %outer.latch, %outer.preheader
  %"$vphi.1" = phi i32 [ 16, %outer.preheader ], [ %.sink6.i.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %"$vphi.0" = phi i32 [ 4, %outer.preheader ], [ %.sink.i.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %local_4_128 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.preheader ], [ %lcssa.iv, %outer.latch ]
  %local_3_127 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.preheader ], [ %local_3_16.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  br label %inner.header

inner.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.body, %outer.header
  %"$vphi.1418" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.1", %outer.header ], [ %.sink6.i, %inner.body ]
  %"$vphi.0419" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.0", %outer.header ], [ %.sink.i, %inner.body ]
  %local_4_128420 = phi i32 [ %local_4_128, %outer.header ], [ %inc, %inner.body ]
  %local_3_127421 = phi i32 [ %local_3_127, %outer.header ], [ %local_3_16, %inner.body ]
  %chunk.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %chunk.iv.next, %inner.body ]
  %c27 = icmp ult i32 %"$vphi.0419", 17
  %c28 = icmp ult i32 %"$vphi.1418", 17
  %wide.chk = and i1 %c28, %c27
  %.not3.i17 = icmp eq i32 %"$vphi.0419", 0
  %v29 = add i32 %"$vphi.0419", -1
  %.sink.i18 = select i1 %.not3.i17, i32 16, i32 %v29
  %c30 = icmp ult i32 %.sink.i18, 17
  %wide.chk354 = and i1 %wide.chk, %c30
  %.not4.i19 = icmp eq i32 %"$vphi.1418", 0
  %v31 = add i32 %"$vphi.1418", -1
  %.sink6.i20 = select i1 %.not4.i19, i32 16, i32 %v31
  %c32 = icmp ult i32 %.sink6.i20, 17
  %wide.chk355 = and i1 %c32, %wide.chk354
  br i1 %wide.chk355, label %inner.body, label %deopt

outer.latch:                                      ; preds = %inner.body
  %.sink.i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %.sink.i, %inner.body ]
  %.sink6.i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %.sink6.i, %inner.body ]
  %local_3_16.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_3_16, %inner.body ]
  %lcssa.iv = phi i32 [ %inc, %inner.body ]
  %.not.lcssa = phi i1 [ %.not, %inner.body ]
  br i1 %.not.lcssa, label %outer.header, label %exit.loop

exit.loop:                                        ; preds = %outer.latch
  %final = phi i32 [ %local_3_16.lcssa, %outer.latch ]
  %result = sitofp i32 %final to double
  br label %exit

inner.body:                                       ; preds = %inner.header
  %chunk.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %chunk.iv, 1
  %v34 = zext nneg i32 %"$vphi.0419" to i64
  %v35 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v34
  %v36 = load i32, ptr %v35, align 4
  %v37 = zext nneg i32 %"$vphi.1418" to i64
  %v38 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v37
  %v39 = load i32, ptr %v38, align 4
  %v40 = sub i32 %v36, %v39
  %v41 = add nsw i32 %v40, 2147483647
  %v42 = icmp slt i32 %v40, 0
  %spec.select.i13 = select i1 %v42, i32 %v41, i32 %v40
  store i32 %spec.select.i13, ptr %v38, align 4
  %v43 = sitofp i32 %spec.select.i13 to double
  %v44 = fmul nnan double %v43, f0x3E00000000200000
  %v45 = zext nneg i32 %.sink.i18 to i64
  %v46 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v45
  %v47 = load i32, ptr %v46, align 4
  %v48 = zext nneg i32 %.sink6.i20 to i64
  %v49 = getelementptr inbounds nuw [4 x i8], ptr %arr, i64 %v48
  %v50 = load i32, ptr %v49, align 4
  %v51 = sub i32 %v47, %v50
  %v52 = add nsw i32 %v51, 2147483647
  %v53 = icmp slt i32 %v51, 0
  %spec.select.i = select i1 %v53, i32 %v52, i32 %v51
  store i32 %spec.select.i, ptr %v49, align 4
  %.not3.i = icmp eq i32 %.sink.i18, 0
  %v54 = add nsw i32 %.sink.i18, -1
  %.sink.i = select i1 %.not3.i, i32 16, i32 %v54
  store i32 %.sink.i, ptr %pos1, align 4
  %.not4.i = icmp eq i32 %.sink6.i20, 0
  %v55 = add nsw i32 %.sink6.i20, -1
  %.sink6.i = select i1 %.not4.i, i32 16, i32 %v55
  store i32 %.sink6.i, ptr %pos2, align 8
  %v56 = sitofp i32 %spec.select.i to double
  %v57 = fmul nnan double %v56, f0x3E00000000200000
  %v58 = fmul nnan double %v44, %v44
  %v59 = fmul nnan double %v57, %v57
  %v60 = fadd double %v58, %v59
  %v61 = fcmp ole double %v60, 1.000000e+00
  %v62 = zext i1 %v61 to i32
  %local_3_16 = add i32 %v62, %local_3_127421
  %inc = add nuw nsw i32 %local_4_128420, 1
  %.not = icmp slt i32 %inc, %n
  %chunk.cond = icmp samesign ult i64 %chunk.iv, 32
  %v64 = and i1 %.not, %chunk.cond
  br i1 %v64, label %inner.header, label %outer.latch

deopt:                                            ; preds = %inner.header
  %"$vphi.0419.lcssa" = phi i32 [ %"$vphi.0419", %inner.header ]
  %local_4_128420.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_4_128420, %inner.header ]
  %local_3_127421.lcssa = phi i32 [ %local_3_127421, %inner.header ]
  call void @sink_use(i32 %"$vphi.0419.lcssa", i32 %local_4_128420.lcssa, i32 %local_3_127421.lcssa)
  ret double 0.000000e+00

exit:                                             ; preds = %exit.loop, %entry
  %ret.val = phi double [ 0.000000e+00, %entry ], [ %result, %exit.loop ]
  %nfp = sitofp i32 %n to double
  %div = fdiv double %ret.val, %nfp
  %mul = fmul double %div, 4.000000e+00
  ret double %mul
}

define void @test_correctness(ptr noalias %p, ptr noalias %q, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %outer.latch, %entry
  %j = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %j.next, %outer.latch ]
  br label %inner.header

inner.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.body, %outer.header
  %a = phi i32 [ 10, %outer.header ], [ %a.next, %inner.body ]
  %b = phi i32 [ 20, %outer.header ], [ %b.next, %inner.body ]
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %i.next, %inner.body ]
  %cond = icmp ult i32 %i, 100
  br i1 %cond, label %inner.body, label %outer.latch

inner.body:                                       ; preds = %inner.header
  %a.next = add nsw i32 %a, -1
  %b.next = add nsw i32 %b, -1
  %i.next = add nuw nsw i32 %i, 1
  %i64 = zext i32 %i to i64
  %i64n = zext i32 %i.next to i64
  %gep0 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %p, i64 %i64
  %gep1 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %p, i64 %i64n
  store i32 %a.next, ptr %gep0, align 4
  store i32 %b.next, ptr %gep1, align 4
  br label %inner.header

outer.latch:                                      ; preds = %inner.header
  %v0.lc = phi i32 [ %a, %inner.header ]
  %v1.lc = phi i32 [ %b, %inner.header ]
  %sum = add i32 %v0.lc, %v1.lc
  store i32 %sum, ptr %q, align 4
  %j.next = add nuw nsw i32 %j, 1
  %outer.cond = icmp slt i32 %j.next, %n
  br i1 %outer.cond, label %outer.header, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %outer.latch
  ret void
}

; Function Attrs: nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare void @use(i32) #0

define void @test_ordering_lcssa_first(ptr noalias %p, ptr noalias %q, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %outer.latch, %entry
  %j = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %j.next, %outer.latch ]
  br label %inner.header

inner.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.body, %outer.header
  %a = phi i32 [ 10, %outer.header ], [ %a.next, %inner.body ]
  %b = phi i32 [ 20, %outer.header ], [ %b.next, %inner.body ]
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %i.next, %inner.body ]
  %cond = icmp ult i32 %i, 100
  br i1 %cond, label %inner.body, label %outer.latch

inner.body:                                       ; preds = %inner.header
  call void @use(i32 %a)
  call void @use(i32 %b)
  %a.next = add nsw i32 %a, -1
  %b.next = add nsw i32 %b, -1
  %i.next = add nuw nsw i32 %i, 1
  %i64 = zext i32 %i to i64
  %i64n = zext i32 %i.next to i64
  %gep0 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %p, i64 %i64
  %gep1 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %p, i64 %i64n
  store i32 %a.next, ptr %gep0, align 4
  store i32 %b.next, ptr %gep1, align 4
  br label %inner.header

outer.latch:                                      ; preds = %inner.header
  %v0.lc = phi i32 [ %a, %inner.header ]
  %v1.lc = phi i32 [ %b, %inner.header ]
  %sum = add i32 %v0.lc, %v1.lc
  store i32 %sum, ptr %q, align 4
  %j.next = add nuw nsw i32 %j, 1
  %outer.cond = icmp slt i32 %j.next, %n
  br i1 %outer.cond, label %outer.header, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %outer.latch
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { nounwind willreturn memory(none) }
